name: Rio Grande Grits Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 1 13x9 inch baking dish.
3. In a large saucepan, bring water to a boil.
4. Gradually stir in grits and garlic salt. Reduce heat; cover and cook for 5 to 7 minutes or until thickened, stirring occasionally.
5. Cut the sausage lengthwise and then crosswise into 1/4 inch slices.
6. In a large skillet, cook the sausage, onion, green pepper, and garlic in oil until onions are tender.
7. Stir in salsa and black beans; heat.
8. Spoon half of the grits into the greased baking dish.
9. Top with half of the sausage mixture and 1 cup cheese.
10. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
11. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until heated through.
12. Serve with sour cream and chopped cilantro.
